mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_expired_certificate WHERE ( (DATEDIFF(expired_time,now()) <= 0 AND `status` != #{status0}) OR (DATEDIFF(expired_time,now()) BETWEEN #{status0}+1 AND #{status3} AND `status` != #{status3}) OR (DATEDIFF(expired_time,now()) BETWEEN #{status3}+1 AND #{status7} AND `status` != #{status7}) OR (DATEDIFF(expired_time,now()) BETWEEN #{status7}+1 AND #{status15} AND `status` != #{status15}) OR (DATEDIFF(expired_time,now()) BETWEEN #{status15}+1 AND #{status30} AND `status` != #{status30}) )
select manager_id,create_user_id from t_shipper where shipper_id = #{shipperId}
select manager_id,create_user_id from t_driver where driver_id = #{driverId}
select manager_id,create_user_id from t_vehicle where vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
select manager_id,create_user_id from t_bracket where bracket_id = #{shipperId}
